AXI Read Engine Completion Status

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x174
Size:
0x4
Source:
stream_regs.rdl

Description

Per-channel read engine all_complete flags

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] RSVD r 0x0 -
[7:0] RD_COMPLETE r - -

Field Descriptions

RSVD

Reserved

RD_COMPLETE

Read completion bits [7:0] - 1=all reads complete, 0=reads pending
